caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, spiky grey hairstyle and glasses is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt and a red bow tie. He wears black over-ear headphones and is smiling and talking into a professional black microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items hanging on a rack, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BOSS TALK" with "PODCAST" underneath, and a similar "BOSS TALK" logo on the right featuring a red microphone icon. Across the sequence, the man remains in the same position, though his facial expression shifts slightly as he continues to speak, with his mouth opening and closing and his eyes crinkling in a smile.
